createActionIdentifier.label: Create action identifier
createActionIdentifier.description: Self-service action used to submit new skill create requests. Defaults to 'submit-skill-create-request'.

updateActionIdentifier.label: Update action identifier
updateActionIdentifier.description: Self-service action (day-2 on skill) used to propose skill updates. Defaults to 'suggest-skill-update-ssa'.

aiAgentIdentifier.label: AI agent identifier (optional)
aiAgentIdentifier.description: Identifier of a Port AI agent to use for 'Create with AI'. Leave blank to use the general-purpose Port AI assistant (/v1/ai/invoke).
